items.title: The Story of Evilspeak & Death Valley (1981/1982) - DOUBLE FEATURE!
items.author: Layton Eversaul
items.content:
In this special "Double Feature" retrospective, I tell the story behind two long-lost gems of 1980's horror: 1981's "Evilspeak" and 1982's "Death Valley"; one the tale of a bullied teen who turns to the powers of darkness to take his vengeance, and the other a slow-burn Hitchcockian thriller with an A-list cast. I dive deep into their development, production and legacy, while providing my own thoughts on the films.

NOW ON PATREON: https://www.patreon.com/LaytonEversaul
Twitter: https://twitter.com/LaytonEversaul
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LaytonReviews
